title: Dr. Bessels Verwandlung
writer: Herbert Juttke, Georg C. Klaren, Ludwig Wolff
actors: Jakob Tiedtke, Sophie Pagay, Hans Stüwe
plot: Alexander Bessel is a young man in a failing marriage. His wife cheats on him, and so the outbreak of WW1 comes in handy for a change. When young French soldier dies right in front of him Bessel seize the opportunity assuming his ...
